00000111111001110101001011011011000100110 - ASI: 21

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  001 = 0 * 01
  110 = 11 * 0
  0010 = 001 * 0
  0101 = 01 * 01
  00110 = 00 * 110
  00111 = 001 * 11
  100111 = 1 * 00111
  110001 = 110 * 001
  110110 = 110 * 110
  0011111 = 00111 * 11
  0000011111 = 000 * 0011111
  0010110110 = 0010 * 110110
  1001110101 = 100111 * 0101
  11000100110 = 110001 * 00110
  00000111111001110101 = 0000011111 * 1001110101
  001011011011000100110 = 0010110110 * 11000100110
  00000111111001110101001011011011000100110 = 00000111111001110101 * 001011011011000100110
